title: Mod Menu No More
description: Mod Menu No More is a Minecraft mod designed to disable the Mod Menu feature within the game. This mod accomplishes this by intentionally breaking the game's metadata formatting, causing the game to malfunction if the Mod Menu is used.
body:
Mod Menu No More is a Minecraft mod designed to disable the Mod Menu feature within the game. This mod accomplishes this by intentionally breaking the game's metadata formatting, causing the game to malfunction if the Mod Menu is used.


Moderation Reply:

I think people will download it for the lolz. Meme in a .jar. Also, I love Modrinth's API, and I wanted to include that into my other projects.

Yes, it makes no sense. 
That's the entire point of it.

Technically it is a minecraft mod and it does exactly as said in description, even tho its totally absurd, I don't really see any harm in it being accepted :) 

Kind regards

Edit.

Mod Menu No More is live on curseforge for less than 9h, 
3 downloads already.

Seems like someone likes the idea after all ;)
